title: Henbrandt Spiral Sketch Drawing Set for Kids 7-Piece Spiral Graph Stencils Geometric Art Kit Children’s Stationery Spiral Drawing Tool Arts and Crafts Set
features: Single Spiral Sketch Drawing Set for children.
This spiral sketch set is the perfect addition to an arts and crafts collection, and makes a great small gift for kids or classroom activity.
The set includes 7 pieces: 1 ring stencil and 6 wheels in a mix of shapes. Use the spiral stencil set to create precise spirals and elaborate decorative mandalas.
The spiral drawing set comes in 3 colour combinations: Blue, Red and Yellow. One colour will be sent at random.
description: This spiral sketch drawing kit for kids is a fantastic addition to any arts and crafts collection. Create elaborate spiral patterns, fantastic floral swirls, and decorative mandalas, then either colour them in or leave them blank and let the swirling patterns speak for themselves. Spiral sketch drawing kits have been a popular classic kids’ toy since the mid-twentieth century, and if you have never tried one before then now is the time to start! To create stunning spiral designs, start with a sheet of paper and use a sharp pencil or a colourful ballpoint pen, hold the outer ring stencil in place, place one of the wheels inside the outer ring stencils, then using your pen or pencil carefully spin the wheel around inside the larger stencil. Before you know it, you will have covered your paper in stunning designs! For added stability, why not use sticky tack or tape to secure the outer ring stencil in place? The art set includes 6 wheels and 1 ring, and the kit comes in 3 assorted colour combinations in Blue, Red and Yellow. Single spiral drawing kit per order. This product carries the CE mark and is compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements.
